sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, text_column String, num_column Int32, nullable_column Nullable(Int32)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT ngramMinHashArgUTF8(text_column, 3, 6) AS ngrams FROM test_table WHERE id == 2;
SELECT ngramMinHashArgUTF8(nullable_column, 3, 6) AS ngrams FROM test_table WHERE nullable_column == NULL;
SELECT id, text_column, ngramMinHashArgUTF8(text_column, 1, 1) FROM test_table WHERE ngramMinHashArgUTF8(text_column, 3, 3).1 == 'Test' OR ngramMinHashArgUTF8(text_column, 3, 3).2 == '' ORDER BY id;
WITH (SELECT ngramMinHashArgUTF8(text_column, 2, 5) FROM test_table WHERE id == 3) AS ngrams_result SELECT ngrams_result WHERE (ngrams_result.1 == 'Boundary' AND ngrams_result.2 == 'Test') LIMIT 1;
CREATE TABLE secondary_table (id UInt32, related_id UInt32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;

SELECT st.id, st.related_id, nt.text_column FROM secondary_table st JOIN test_table nt ON st.related_id == nt.id WHERE ngramMinHashArgUTF8(nt.text_column, 2, 4).1 == 'Te' HAVING COUNT(nt.text_column) > 0;
SELECT id, ngramMinHashArgUTF8(text_column, 5, 1) FROM test_table GROUP BY text_column HAVING ngramMinHashArgUTF8(text_column, 5, 1).2 == ngramMinHashArgUTF8('BoundaryTest', 5, 1).1;
